Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES
ORDERED TO THIRD READING RULES CAL.1439

Title: Authorizes pharmacists to dispense HIV pre-exposure and post-exposure prophylaxis
Summary: Authorizes pharmacists to dispense HIV pre-exposure and post-exposure prophylaxis.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to authorizing pharmacists to dispense HIV pre-exposure and post-exposure prophylaxis
